languages.text: "Знаю ли я?" {n}Эоганн печально улыбается.{/n} "Это место долгое время было нашим с Нунциусом узилищем и домом. Каждый его коридор запечатлен в архивах моей памяти с пиктографической точностью".

"Know it?" {n}Eogunn smiles sadly.{/n} "For Nuncius and myself, this place was long our dwelling place, and our dungeon. Every corridor is etched into my memory's archives with pictographic precision."
languages.original_text: "Знаю ли я?" {n}Эоганн печально улыбается.{/n} "Это место долгое время было нашим с Нунциусом узилищем и домом. Каждый его коридор запечатлен в архивах моей памяти с пиктографической точностью".

traits.locale_text: "Know it?" {n}Eogunn smiles sadly.{/n} "For Nuncius and myself, this place was long our dungeon and our dwelling. Every corridor of it is etched into my memory's archives with pictographic precision."

"Know it?" {n}Eogunn smiles sadly.{/n} "For Nuncius and myself, this place was long our dungeon and our dwelling. Every corridor of it is etched into my memory's archives with pictographic precision."

"Know it?" {n}Eogunn smiles sadly.{/n} "For Nuncius and myself, this place was long our dwelling place, and our dungeon. Every corridor is etched into my memory's archives with pictographic precision."

"Know it?" {n}Eogunn smiles sadly.{/n} "For Nuncius and myself, this place was long our dwelling place, and our dungeon. Every corridor is etched into my memory's archives with pictographic precision."

languages.text: "Wissen?" {n}Eogunn lächelt traurig.{/n} "Für Nuncius und mich war dieser Ort lange unsere Heim und unser Kerker. Jeder Gang ist mit piktografischer Präzision in die Archive meines Gedächtnisses gebrannt."
languages.original_text: "Know it?" {n}Eogunn smiles sadly.{/n} "For Nuncius and myself, this place was long our dwelling place, and our dungeon. Every corridor is etched into my memory's archives with pictographic precision."

traits.locale_text: "Wissen?" {n}Eogunn lächelt traurig.{/n} "Für Nuncius und mich war dieser Ort lange unsere Heim und unser Kerker. Jeder Gang ist mit piktografischer Präzision in die Archive meines Gedächtnisses gebrannt."

languages.text: « Si je le sais ? {n}Eogunn vous adresse un sourire attristé.{/n} Avec Nuncius, nous avons longtemps considéré cet endroit comme notre demeure, notre place forte. Chacun de ces couloirs est consigné dans les archives de ma mémoire avec une précision pictographique. »
languages.original_text: "Know it?" {n}Eogunn smiles sadly.{/n} "For Nuncius and myself, this place was long our dwelling place, and our dungeon. Every corridor is etched into my memory's archives with pictographic precision."

traits.locale_text: « Si je le sais ? {n}Eogunn vous adresse un sourire attristé.{/n} Avec Nuncius, nous avons longtemps considéré cet endroit comme notre demeure, notre place forte. Chacun de ces couloirs est consigné dans les archives de ma mémoire avec une précision pictographique. »

languages.text: “岂止知道。”{n}伊奥贡露出一个苦涩的笑容。{/n}“对我和努恩修斯来说，这里曾是我们的栖身之所，也是我们的牢笼。每条走廊都像刻在我记忆档案里一般，清清楚楚。”
languages.original_text: "Know it?" {n}Eogunn smiles sadly.{/n} "For Nuncius and myself, this place was long our dwelling place, and our dungeon. Every corridor is etched into my memory's archives with pictographic precision."

traits.locale_text: “岂止知道。”{n}伊奥贡露出一个苦涩的笑容。{/n}“对我和努恩修斯来说，这里曾是我们的栖身之所，也是我们的牢笼。每条走廊都像刻在我记忆档案里一般，清清楚楚。”

languages.text: «¿Que si lo sé?». {n}Eogunn sonríe tristemente.{/n} «Para Nuncius y para mí, este lugar servía de morada y de mazmorra. Tengo grabado cada pasillo en la memoria con calidad pictográfica».
languages.original_text: "Know it?" {n}Eogunn smiles sadly.{/n} "For Nuncius and myself, this place was long our dwelling place, and our dungeon. Every corridor is etched into my memory's archives with pictographic precision."

traits.locale_text: «¿Que si lo sé?». {n}Eogunn sonríe tristemente.{/n} «Para Nuncius y para mí, este lugar servía de morada y de mazmorra. Tengo grabado cada pasillo en la memoria con calidad pictográfica».

languages.text: "知ってる？"{n}エオグンは悲しげに微笑む。{/n}"ヌンシウスと私にとって、ここは長い間、私たちの住処であり、私たちの地下牢だった。どの廊下も、絵のように正確に私の記憶の書庫に刻まれている"
languages.original_text: "Know it?" {n}Eogunn smiles sadly.{/n} "For Nuncius and myself, this place was long our dwelling place, and our dungeon. Every corridor is etched into my memory's archives with pictographic precision."

languages.text: "Biliyor muyum?" {n}Eogunn üzgünce gülümsüyor.{/n} "Burası, Nuncius ve bana uzun süre hem mesken hem de zindan oldu. Her koridor, piktografik bir hassasiyetle hafızamın arşivlerine kazındı."
languages.original_text: "Know it?" {n}Eogunn smiles sadly.{/n} "For Nuncius and myself, this place was long our dwelling place, and our dungeon. Every corridor is etched into my memory's archives with pictographic precision."

traits.locale_text: "Biliyor muyum?" {n}Eogunn üzgünce gülümsüyor.{/n} "Burası, Nuncius ve bana uzun süre hem mesken hem de zindan oldu. Her koridor, piktografik bir hassasiyetle hafızamın arşivlerine kazındı."
